channel.title: HUNTER Phase 2 Collection Feed
channel.description: Deterministic RSS feed used to validate the Celery-backed collection pipeline.

item.title: Credential phishing campaign targets finance teams
item.description: Analysts observed login.badcorp-secure.com serving a phishing kit from 198.51.100.77 and referencing CVE-2026-12345.

item.title: Malware loader drops archive with hash artifacts
item.description: Campaign payload uses sha256 aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa and sender alerts@badcorp-secure.com.
